The '''Sword of Honor''' was [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Michael Tandre]]'s orange-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] which he left for his [[Kentra]] disciples on [[Orellon II]].<ref name="The Prophecy" />
